title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
author: openai-blog
raw_description: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.
summary: OpenAI Signals数据显示ChatGPT在全球范围内采用率增长，用户使用频率增加，探索更多功能，推动各区域和语言的使用增长。
analysis_note: 内容为市场数据报告，技术深度一般，但展示了AI应用趋势，对了解行业动态有参考价值。
